name: Concord Rising
synopsis: Three days marking the night the Ring of Doors first held and the worlds stopped drifting apart. Lattice-lanterns are strung from every gate in Concordia, and embassies from the nine sub-worlds light a shared beacon at the plaza. The Three Above All are thanked, and the Ninth Refusal is read aloud.

quest_seeds.title: Light the Beacon
quest_seeds.summary: Gather a lantern-ember from each of three sub-world embassies at the plaza and add them to the shared beacon. Compose a summary DTU of what each delegation hopes the concord holds.

quest_seeds.title: The Reading of the Ninth
quest_seeds.summary: Attend the public reading of the Ninth Refusal at the Ring of Doors and cite the codex passage that names the refusal the hub itself keeps.
